title: Dark-Mode Restaurant Website Hero Food Photography Pack
one_line_ask: Retouch a restaurant's raw plated-dish photos into a cohesive dark-mode hero-image pack (hero + menu tiles + mobile crop) and assemble a Firefly moodboard for the agency's web designer.

issues: Slight tilt and paper texture visible (acceptable per brief for source asset)
Background is off-white with visible paper fibers (acceptable per brief)
Minor shadow and wood surface visible (acceptable for source, will be removed in vectorization)
Slight perspective tilt/angle to card (acceptable per brief as designer fix)
Paper texture visible on card stock (acceptable per brief as designer fix)
Wooden surface background visible (acceptable per brief, not a pure white studio shot)
Very slight warm tungsten color cast present but within acceptable brief parameters
Contrast is mildly flat consistent with straight-out-of-camera DSLR look as specified
Tilt appears minimal, possibly under the 4-degree target but still present
Pea puree smear and micro-herb garnish well-executed with genuine food texture
All three scallops show authentic golden sear crust with real Maillard detail
Slate plate texture clearly visible and photoreal
No CGI gloss or render artifacts detected
Composition is well-centered and sharp on the main subject
No visible branding or text
Very slight warm color cast on the liquid (expected pre-grade, not penalized)
Background bokeh is quite dark/dense but within documentary bar style
Lemon twist garnish is slightly asymmetric but naturalistic
Chocolate lava flow pools directly on marble surface rather than a plate/board which may not match all menu tile conventions, but fits documentary brief
Gold leaf flakes are small and could be more prominent for garnish visibility at thumbnail scale
Cocoa dust scatter is slightly heavy on the left side creating minor asymmetry, though within acceptable candid range
